sample.title: Bearing
sample.derived_hold_sentence: Bearing is held by [[Strain]]. Strain must remain pressing while it is held.

sample.title: Out
sample.derived_hold_sentence: Out is held by [[Boundary]]. A boundary must locate distinction before exterior placement can be read.

sample.title: Connection
sample.derived_hold_sentence: Connection is held by [[Relation]]. Relation must remain held for connection within relation to be available..
sample.expl_para: Connection is held by [[Relation]]. Relation must remain held before connection within relation can be read.

sample.title: Not
sample.derived_hold_sentence: Not is held by [[Boundary]], [[Availability]]. Scope must be bounded and availability readable before non-availability can be marked.
sample.expl_para: Not marks that what cannot be reached, traced, or carried within the current structure is not available here.

sample.title: Change
sample.derived_hold_sentence: Change is held by [[Traversal]], [[Difference]].

sample.title: Dimension
sample.derived_hold_sentence: Dimension is held by [[Difference]], [[Closure Scope]].

sample.title: Within
sample.derived_hold_sentence: Within is held by [[In]], [[Clearance]], [[Boundary]].

sample.expl_para: Relative does not mean unreal, arbitrary, or merely subjective. It means placed. A relative read is answerable to the relation, ratio, reference frame, scope, scale, and carrying conditions through wh

sample.title: Binding

sample.title: Cognitive Metabolism
sample.derived_hold_sentence: Cognitive Metabolism is held by [[Cognition]], [[Thought]], [[Metabolism]], [[Body]], [[Coupling]], [[Reality Check]]. Cognition and thought must be present, and thought must remain coupled to the bod
sample.expl_para: The traceable question is not whether a person thinks too much. The traceable question is whether thought remains coupled to the organism that carries it.

sample.title: Tracing
sample.derived_hold_sentence: Tracing is held by [[Trace]], [[Practice]].

sample.title: Practice
sample.derived_hold_sentence: Practice is held by [[Participation]], [[Recurrence]], [[Attend]], [[Readability]]. Participation must recur, remain attended, and stay readable enough for correction to occur..

sample.title: Check
sample.derived_hold_sentence: Check is held by [[Practice]], [[Boundary]], [[Tracing]], [[Retracing]].

sample.title: Dependency Order
sample.derived_hold_sentence: Dependency Order is held by [[Root Order]]. The governing arrangement must hold and be readable before structural precedence within it can be named.

sample.title: Primitive
sample.derived_hold_sentence: Primitive is held by [[Root Order]]. The governing arrangement must hold before a stopping point within it can be named.

sample.title: Label
sample.derived_hold_sentence: Label is held by [[Root Order]]. Dependency arrangement must hold before naming of any kind, including marking without conditions, can occur.

sample.derived_hold_sentence: Higher Retrace is held by [[Higher Recognition]].
